title: A 15-meter-diameter flying saucer was observed in Curitiba [2000]
excerpt: MAY 13th, 2000. Time: 12:52 am. Duration: 20 minutes. text_preview:
MAY 13th, 2000. Time: 12:52 am. Duration: 20 minutes. A witness living in Bairro Alto in Curitiba, State of Paraná, spotted an unidentified flying object in the shape of a plate and circle, “flying saucer”, in white and yellow colors. According to the witness, the UFO was about 15 meters in size, and was at an altitude between 5 km and 8 km. The unknown object was seen moving from West to East without leaving a trail of condensation.

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações do Arquivo Nacional (SIAN). Fundo ‘Objeto Voador Não Identificado (OVNI)’. Código de Referência BR DFANBSB
summary: A witness in Bairro Alto, Curitiba observed an estimated 15-meter white and yellow flying-saucer-shaped UFO at 5–8km altitude moving west to east for 20 minutes.
